name: Viceroy Hotels Limited
summary: Viceroy Hotels Limited engages in the hoteliering business in India. The company owns, operates, franchises, and markets a 297 room hotel with restaurants and a convention center under the Marriott name; a 120 room hotel with banquet halls and fine dine restaurant under the Courtyard Marriott name; a 56 room budget hotel under the Minerva name; restaurants under the Minerva Coffee Shop name; and fine dine bars under the Bluefox name in Hyderabad and Vijayawada. It also operates Eat Street, a food court with Minerva Coffee Shop and other kiosks, as well as Waterfront fine dine restaurant. Viceroy Hotels Limited was founded in 1965 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
